author: lOrm
content: cmd_chat decomposed: ChatRepl struct + 30+ bounded methods in src/cli/chat_repl.rs. cmd_chat now 28 lines (was 2399). All clippy --all-targets --all-features errors cleared. 1176 lib tests + 69 bin tests pass. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore] added. main.rs shrank by 2862 lines; chat_repl.rs new at 2704.
